overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a survival horror video game. The player character holds a torch that casts flickering warm light on the dirt path and surrounding trees while proceeding deeper into the dense woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail surrounded by dense trees

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark forest path while holding a torch that illuminates the dirt trail and surrounding tree trunks

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with scattered leaves and rocks
dense cluster of tall trees forming the left boundary of the path
thick forest vegetation and tree trunks on the right side
large tree trunk with rough bark texture visible on the right side of the path
low bushes and ferns growing alongside the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by the warm glow of a handheld torch. The camera moves forward along the narrow dirt path, passing between dense walls of trees on both sides. A prominent tree trunk emerges on the right as the path continues deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest section with tunnel-like darkness ahead

events.description: torch light swings across the path illuminating different sections of the forest floor and tree trunks

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper into the forest, passing close to a large tree trunk on the right while the path ahead grows darker

entered.detail: deeply shadowed section of forest ahead where the path disappears into near-total darkness

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the woods, the initial tree lines pass behind as new sections of forest emerge. The path continues forward into an increasingly dark tunnel-like section of woods. The torchlight swings across the scene, briefly illuminating undergrowth and tree trunks before the darkness ahead absorbs the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark forest trail that gradually tightens into a claustrophobic, tunnel-like corridor of trees. It begins on a narrow dirt path illuminated by the warm, flickering glow of a handheld torch, passing between dense walls of foliage and a prominent tree trunk on the right. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the initial treeline recedes to make way for an increasingly oppressive canopy of overhanging branches. The scene then shifts as the torchlight swings across the surrounding undergrowth, briefly cutting through the gloom before the path is absorbed by a deepening, impenetrable darkness ahead.
